task_completion.description: QGIS application is open with a new or blank project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main QGIS application window is visible on the screen with an empty map canvas.

task_completion.description: The 'Save Project As' dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser dialog box for saving the project is visible over the QGIS window.

task_completion.description: The save directory is navigated to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the save dialog, the current path or breadcrumb navigation shows 'projects' inside 'GIS_Data' (or /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/).

task_completion.description: The filename 'my_first_project.qgs' is entered in the save dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File name' text field in the save dialog contains 'my_first_project.qgs', OR 'my_first_project' is entered and the 'Save as type' dropdown is explicitly set to the uncompressed '.qgs' format.

task_completion.description: The project is successfully saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog is closed and the main QGIS window title bar displays 'my_first_project' (usually 'my_first_project - QGIS').

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI to save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus (e.g., Project -> Save As) and dialogs, rather than terminal commands like 'touch my_first_project.qgs'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual QGIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS interface with its standard toolbars, panels (like Layers and Browser), and map canvas is clearly visible, not a text editor or generic file manager.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application using terminal shortcuts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent simply opening a terminal and typing a command to create an empty file in the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project name is 'my_first_project.qgs'. The expected directory for saving the project is '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects'.
